title: abacopteris lineata
intro: Abacopteris lineata, also known as the lineated fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its linear and lanceolate fronds. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abacopteris lineata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies for its potential medicinal properties.
